overview: A professional IoT dashboard for monitoring and controlling DC motors used in agricultural electric fencing to prevent wildlife attacks. Features real-time motor status cards, temperature monitoring with predictive insights, manual motor switching, overheating alerts, and ESP device connectivity management — all in a minimal Apple-inspired UI.
features: Real-time motor status cards with ON/OFF indicators and live temperature
Temperature prediction with 15min/30min/1h/2h forecasts and animated charts
One-click motor switching with visual feedback animations
Overheating alert system with red warning cards
ESP device connections page with signal strength indicators
Dark mode toggle with light/dark theme persistence
Apple-inspired minimal UI with smooth transitions and micro-animations
Responsive design — desktop-first with mobile support
